name: Bill Clinton
subject: Turn on your TV--
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:

Right now, Hillary's making her case for why she's the most qualified candidate to be the Democratic nominee for president. I think she's doing great.

name: Jeff Weaver at Bernie Debate HQ
subject: "Your damn emails"
body:
#
Friend -
I hope you're watching this! We're only about an hour into the debate, and we wanted to share this special moment with you.
Anderson Cooper asked about Secretary Clinton's emails and Bernie responded, "What the Secretary said is right. And that is the American people are tired of hearing about your damn emails." This campaign should be about the grotesque levels of income and wealth inequality in our country, the unprecedented planetary emergency of our changing climate, and our need to invest in jobs and education, not jails and incarceration. He got the biggest applause of the night.
We clipped the video and needed to share it with you immediately. Watch it right now, and if you're as fired up as we are about how things are going, make a contribution of $23.81 -- the average donation made to our campaign during the debate -- before Bernie steps off the stage.
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/tonights-debate**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2596/43f17890/553e2635/621f9ba7/998776698/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dem-debates?refcode=em151013full")
This is the most important night of our campaign so far. I can't wait to share the reports from our watch parties and fundraising drive with Bernie when he gets off the stage. Chip in to show your love for Bernie tonight.
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2596/43f17890/553e2635/621f9ba7/998776698/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dem-debates?refcode=em151013full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2596/43f17890/553e2635/621f9093/998776698/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2596/43f17890/553e2635/621f9090/998776698/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2596/43f17890/553e2635/621f9091/998776698/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tonight's debate proved we can win
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
I just walked off the debate stage and wanted to thank you. This is the first time I've ever participated in a nationally televised debate, and it meant a lot to know that there were so many people cheering me on at thousands of debate watch parties and in their homes.
But this campaign isn't about Bernie Sanders. It's not a baseball game or a soap opera, and it shouldn't be about anyone's emails. What this campaign is about is the grotesque levels of income inequality in this country and whether we can mobilize our people to take back our democracy from a handful of billionaires. But it will take everyone coming together if that's going to happen.
So I want to ask you directly:
[**Make a $3 contribution to our political revolution that will win the Democratic nomination, the White House, and take back our country from the billionaire class:**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb259f/43f17890/5508a819/621f9947/2448086872/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/debate-with-bernie?refcode=em151013full")
This country faces more serious problems today than at any time in modern history, and establishment politics will not successfully resolve them. Tonight we proved that not only can we win an election, but we can ensure no one who works full-time will have to live in poverty, that we can provide education as a right, and that we can guarantee health care for all Americans.
Thank you for your support.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb259f/43f17890/5508a819/621f9947/2448086872/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/debate-with-bernie?refcode=em151013full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb259f/43f17890/5508a819/621f9945/2448086872/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb259f/43f17890/5508a819/621f9942/2448086872/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb259f/43f17890/5508a819/621f9943/2448086872/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: A message from Bill Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | Bill Clinton talking about Marco Rubio:"We've got to **DESTROY HIM** before he gets off the ground."
---
| Peter, That's right. Bill Clinton said that they have to "destroy" Marco in order for Hillary to avoid facing him head-on in the general election, according to sources close to the former president. This bombshell report in a new book about the Democrats' secret plan to take out Marco -- orchestrated by Bill Clinton himself -- was revealed earlier this morning and we may not have much time to prepare. **[We're calling on every supporter to make an immediate contribution of $7 or more right now so we'll be ready to defend Marco from the Clintons' impending onslaught.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44413748:67yHcYLNJ:m:1:1349778030:65CC1203642C6774DF0002E7F7F424F8:r)** Why are the Clintons so worried about Marco? Here's the transcript from the interview on FOX News this morning:
---
| **ED KLEIN:** [Bill Clinton] went down the entire list of the Republican candidates, and came to the conclusion that Marco Rubio would present Hillary with the greatest challenge, because of his age, generational change . . . he could be a very formidable challenger. **STEVE DOOCY:** So, your source says Bill Clinton feels that Marco Rubio is the one they need to take out? **ED KLEIN:** Exactly. Not my opinion -- it's Bill Clinton's opinion and I take Bill Clinton's opinion on those kinds of things.
---
| We've known for months now that Marco is the Clinton campaign's #1 target on the Republican side. But now we know that the fear of facing Marco next November goes straight to the top and they're going to do whatever it takes to "destroy" Marco. When the Clintons promise to "destroy" someone that means only one thing: the full force of the Left's attack operation will be trained directly on Marco and our campaign. [_**We won't be able to fight back without your support. Click here to chip in $7 or more right now.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44413748:67yHcYLNJ:m:1:1349778030:65CC1203642C6774DF0002E7F7F424F8:r) Thanks! Alex ConantCommunications DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | [**Donate** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44413748:67yHcYLNJ:m:1:1349778030:65CC1203642C6774DF0002E7F7F424F8:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Too many emails? Click [here](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive updates less often.[
Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Ben Carson
subject: Guess what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
|
---
Guess what Peter? We're continuing to move up -- fast.

A brand new Fox News poll released late yesterday has some great news. Not only am I just a single point behind Republican frontrunner Donald Trump, but it shows me running strongest against Hillary Clinton in a general election. I'm leading her by 11 points, 50-39.

After the media's relentless attacks on me over the past few weeks, these numbers are particularly encouraging. I'm hopeful that our momentum will only increase as I continue to tell the truth regardless of what the PC police say is "controversial."

**There are times that we must step on the gas -- and this is one of them.

**[**Even if it's just a few dollars, I ask you to make a donation to my campaign today.

**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30998400:s_Jk_FmkN:m:1:876315805:278FA12A8E2238B93563AAA78C40CDB5:r)Thanks so much Peter. Let's keep moving forward.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |

The next few months are crucial. I need your help to make sure I am the one holding Secretary Clinton accountable in these debates. \-- Chris

name: John Kasich
subject: Can you believe Hillary said that?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

In last evening's Democrat debate, Hillary Clinton was asked who she's most proud to have as an enemy and her response was "the Republicans".

**If she's elected President, how does she expect to get anything done at all if she views Republicans as her enemies?**

Americans are sick of the division in this country and a continuation of the Obama-legacy of partisan politics will only further prevent us from finding solutions to our biggest challenges.

**W e should stop demonizing others for having different opinions**.

I have twin daughters and I wake up every day focused on finding ways that we can ensure that they and every kid in America don't have to pay for our inaction and our endless politicking.

**Enough is enough, Hillary!**

**[Peter, \- if you agree, please chip in right now to show your support so we can continue to get this message out](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31002143:s_hq5FmRN:m:1:958431888:51C96C220FDF41FF6B286D435177EB2D:r)**. Together, we can fix America.

-John

**John Kasich
**Governor of Ohio

clean_body: www.JohnKasich.com In last evening's Democrat debate, Hillary Clinton was asked who she's most proud to have as an enemy and her response was "the Republicans". If she's elected President, how does she expect to get anything done at all if she views Republicans as her enemies? Americans are sick of the division in this country and a continuation of the Obama-legacy of partisan politics will only further prevent us from finding solutions to our biggest challenges. W e should stop demonizing others for having different opinions. I have twin daughters and I wake up every day focused on finding ways that we can ensure that they and every kid in America don't have to pay for our inaction and our endless politicking. Enough is enough, Hillary! . Together, we can fix America. -John John Kasich Governor of Ohio Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 18, 2015. name: Bill Clinton
subject: I know you agree:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I'm proud of Hillary. | Friend --

At last night’s debate, the whole world got to see the Hillary I know: the smart, passionate, tenacious woman who’s spent her entire career fighting for families. The woman who turned down big law firms to work for the Children’s Defense Fund, who took on Congress to get health care for kids, who went all the way to Beijing to tell the world that women’s rights are human rights, once and for all.

I can’t think of a single person who’d be a better president.

**But Hillary can’t win without you.**Chip in $1 or more right now, and let’s get this done:**** [ | [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM3NDIzNTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNDA5MTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Bill

name: John Kasich
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

We heard last night from the Democrat candidates that they intend to continue President Obama's big government legacy and have no plan whatsoever to get responsible with America's growing debt.

On Thursday I will release the framework for a plan to get money, power and influence out of Washington and back to Americans - including a pathway to a balanced federal budget.
**
Tune in to watch online:**

**Date:** Thursday, Oct. 15
**Time:** 10:30AM EDT
**Watch:** C-SPAN TV or [C-SPAN.org](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31009077:WyqlCemWN:m:1:958431888:2FE06220A8EDBE65809F23E3ACD20332:r)

**Peter, I'll need your help to get this message out.**

**Here are a few ways you can help today:**

**1.** **[Chip in with a $25 or more contribution to help](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31009078:WyqlCemWN:m:1:958431888:2FE06220A8EDBE65809F23E3ACD20332:r)** ensure that we have the funds we'll need to continue our growth. [JohnKasich.com/Donate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31009078:WyqlCemWN:m:1:958431888:2FE06220A8EDBE65809F23E3ACD20332:r)

**2.** **Forward this email to five or more friends** \- ask them to sign up for our updates at: [JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/31009079:WyqlCemWN:m:1:958431888:2FE06220A8EDBE65809F23E3ACD20332:r)

We have the strongest team in New Hampshire and our team is growing in the critical primary states we'll need to win.

**With your support, we can get our message out about how we can make America stronger and more safe**.

Thank you for all that you're doing to help.

-John

**Governor of Ohio

name: Team Katie
subject: About last night
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Did you catch last night's Democratic presidential debate?

It was such a contrast to the divisive rhetoric we've been seeing recently from extremists on the right. Instead of hearing plans to repeal Obamacare and defund Planned Parenthood, we heard thoughtful plans to improve the lives of all Americans. What a great reminder of why we're in this race -- to fight for and defend Democratic principles both nationally and at home in Pennsylvania.

No matter which candidate you're rooting for, one thing is clear: **The next Democratic president needs a Democratic Senate.** And to turn the Senate blue, it all comes down to Katie's race in Pennsylvania.

**[Let's take back the Senate: Pitch in $5 today and help Katie beat Pat Toomey >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/1990076566935175168/-2221661100456280064?refcode=e20151014u&amount=15)**

Thanks,

Team Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1990076566935175168/-2221661100456280064?refcode=e20151014u&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Jindal?=
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | If you want to know how out of touch today’s Democrat Party is with America, consider last night’s debate where the Democrat candidates actually debated whether capitalism was a good thing, and the idea of socialism went largely unchallenged. **That is insanity.**

Here is a scary thought: the candidates on stage might actually be more extreme than Barack Obama. And we are only one election away from potentially losing the idea of America.

**Shame on us if we let that happen**. [I will fight with every ounce of energy I have to make sure that doesn’t happen, but I need your help.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=4a59b027f1&e=724c64cfa7)

The DC establishment says we must compromise our conservative principles to win the general election. **That is insanity**. Our ideas are better, and we shouldn’t be afraid to say so.

Let’s take our country back. [Donate $100, $50 or even $10 right now to stand for conservative principles and to keep building our grassroots movement in Iowa and across the country.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=52122bc1f4&e=724c64cfa7)

Thank you,
Bobby

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=6ff7873c53&e=724c64cfa7)

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: urgent action needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend - Every day we see the mounting death toll from senseless gun violence in Maryland and around the nation. The refusal of Congress to act in the face of these daily tragedies in sickening.

**[Add your name and demand that Congress let us vote to pass real gun safety legislation right now.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb6/70cdc2ba/47b71fa3/3961f62/1405389051/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-pass-commonsense-gun-laws?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+and+demand+that+Congress+l&utm_campaign=em101415&source=em101415")**

For far too long, Republicans in Congress have stonewalled gun legislation in this country - choosing the NRA over the safety of our nation. But the time for inaction is over. **[That's why we must all demand that Republicans in Congress let us vote on common sense laws to prevent the senseless tragedies taking place every day in Maryland and around the country. ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb6/70cdc2ba/47b71fa3/3961f60/1405389051/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-pass-commonsense-gun-laws?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+must+all+demand+that+R&utm_campaign=em101415&source=em101415")**

Let's put an end to this national crisis. Add your name here: **[action.vanhollen.org/let-us-vote](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb6/70cdc2ba/47b71fa3/3961f7f/1405389051/VEsF/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-pass-commonsense-gun-laws?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+actionvanhollenorgletusvote&utm_campaign=em101415&source=em101415")**

Thank you,

Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We are off and running
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
I want to talk with you about last night -- but not what happened in Vegas. I want to talk about what happened across the country.
Our supporters organized more than 4,000 debate watch parties in homes, pubs, and public venues, and more than 100,000 people came together to watch the debate at these events.
**In American politics, there are two primary sources of power: organized people and organized money.** Last night proved that we have the people and that we're well organized.
Now let's show them that we can compete with the billionaire class, too.
[**Your contribution of $25.55 -- the average donation we've received this week -- will help us continue to build a movement that will win the White House for the people. **](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8599/4214055649/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/off-and-running?refcode=em151014non-att")
The debate watch parties that you organized -- again, more than 4,000 of them -- serve as the backbone of the organization that will turn out votes and help us win this election.
We heard from so many hosts of these events, and I want to share some of their stories with you, because I think that it speaks to this special moment we have together.
> "I'm in a rural part of Texas that is overwhelmingly Republican. I met a kindred soul in this sea of red and we hit it off." \- Barbara in Texas
> "I got a big hug from a gentleman who thought he was alone in our rural area and was so glad to see so many like minded people." - Marian in Missouri
> "Awesome night last night. Bernie - words can't describe what a tremendous job he did." - Tom in Nebraska
> "When Bernie mentioned the debate parties, we all clapped and cheered. It definitely made us each feel as though we are part of this movement. It was wonderful!" \- Heidi in New Jersey
> "What a great debate! I appreciated how the candidates kept it respectable and concentrated on the issues that face us. It was fun sitting with fellow Bernie supporters and cheering him on. There is a real buzz about him in North Iowa. I look forward to the next debate." - Steve in Iowa
> "There are very few progressives in this rural corner of SC, we were all really happy to have found each other. Lively conversation, good food, cold beer....plans to watch the rest of the debates together." \- Barbara in South Carolina
> "We had a wonderful, intergenerational group. Everyone was engaged in the night's discourse. We laughed; we cheered; it was amazing. I have a small apartment, and I set the capacity at 6 not including me and my roommates. Then people started calling, and my party grew to 8. Then 10. Then 12. Then 14 in my tiny apartment!" - Nikki in Missouri
> "There were a large number of people in my apartment and no one really knew each other. Sven came to my first hosting party in August and last night brought a table to sign people up for volunteering based on precincts. So we are off and running." \- Diane in Colorado
When we started this campaign, a lot of folks wrote us off. **Well, I think last night showed them wrong, and that we can win. We are indeed off and running.**
Nothing significant in this country happens in terms of change unless a strong grassroots movement takes place. That's what we're building together, and people should not underestimate us.
[**Help us take the next step to build our campaign with a contribution of $25.55 -- the average donation we've received this week.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8599/4214055649/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/off-and-running?refcode=em151014non-att")
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8599/4214055649/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/off-and-running?refcode=em151014non-att")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8586/4214055649/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8587/4214055649/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8584/4214055649/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2584/43f17890/556e2e81/621f8585/4214055649/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Brothers and Sisters - I want to talk with you about last night -- but not what happened in Vegas. I want to talk about what happened across the country. Our supporters organized more than 4,000 debate watch parties in homes, pubs, and public venues, and more than 100,000 people came together to watch the debate at these events. In American politics, there are two primary sources of power: organized people and organized money. Last night proved that we have the people and that we're well organized. Now let's show them that we can compete with the billionaire class, too. "" The debate watch parties that you organized -- again, more than 4,000 of them -- serve as the backbone of the organization that will turn out votes and help us win this election. We heard from so many hosts of these events, and I want to share some of their stories with you, because I think that it speaks to this special moment we have together. "I'm in a rural part of Texas that is overwhelmingly Republican. I met a kindred soul in this sea of red and we hit it off." \- Barbara in Texas "I got a big hug from a gentleman who thought he was alone in our rural area and was so glad to see so many like minded people." - Marian in Missouri "Awesome night last night. Bernie - words can't describe what a tremendous job he did." - Tom in Nebraska "When Bernie mentioned the debate parties, we all clapped and cheered. It definitely made us each feel as though we are part of this movement. It was wonderful!" \- Heidi in New Jersey "What a great debate! I appreciated how the candidates kept it respectable and concentrated on the issues that face us. It was fun sitting with fellow Bernie supporters and cheering him on. There is a real buzz about him in North Iowa. I look forward to the next debate." - Steve in Iowa "There are very few progressives in this rural corner of SC, we were all really happy to have found each other. Lively conversation, good food, cold beer....plans to watch the rest of the debates together." \- Barbara in South Carolina "We had a wonderful, intergenerational group. Everyone was engaged in the night's discourse. We laughed; we cheered; it was amazing. I have a small apartment, and I set the capacity at 6 not including me and my roommates. Then people started calling, and my party grew to 8. Then 10. Then 12. Then 14 in my tiny apartment!" - Nikki in Missouri "There were a large number of people in my apartment and no one really knew each other. Sven came to my first hosting party in August and last night brought a table to sign people up for volunteering based on precincts. So we are off and running." \- Diane in Colorado When we started this campaign, a lot of folks wrote us off. Well, I think last night showed them wrong, and that we can win. We are indeed off and running. Nothing significant in this country happens in terms of change unless a strong grassroots movement takes place. That's what we're building together, and people should not underestimate us. "" Thank you for all you do. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Bill Clinton
subject: She won
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
